evals.prompt: I don't know the shape yet — chart this epic into a plan.
evals.expected_output: Should route to map-it. Should name the destination, chart decision-tickets, clear the research/decision frontier with HITL at each decision, freeze the plan/spec, prepare (but not dispatch) a DAG, and hand off to ship-it.
assertions: Hands off frozen map to ship-it

evals.prompt: Plan this feature so we can build it next quarter.
evals.expected_output: Should route to map-it when authorization to build is not yet given. Should produce decisions + a frozen execution map, not production code.
Should NOT route to map-it. Ready-to-build intent routes directly to ship-it. map-it is only for uncertainty that exceeds the threshold where implementation can be authorized.
